key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, cow’s milk
Prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid artificial fragrances
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a total budget of $180. Must-have groceries include poultry (chicken breast 2 lbs or turkey if cheaper), fresh produce (spinach, cherry tomatoes, avocados), brown rice, olive oil, and dairy-free alternatives (dairy-free Greek yogurt, unsweetened almond milk). Stock up on pantry staples (black beans, chickpeas, salsa, oats) plus household items (paper towels, dish soap, kitchen trash bags). Preferences: avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk; avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging. For substitution questions email kesha.williams@example.com; pay with household card ending 4821.
